remember: Students will be able to recall the definition and properties of determinants.
Students will be able to identify the types of determinants, such as 2x2, 3x3, and 4x4.
Students will be able to recall the formula for finding the determinant of a square matrix.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of cofactor expansion and its application in finding determinants.
Students will be able to comprehend the role of minors and cofactors in the expansion of determinants.
Students will be able to appreciate the significance of determinants in solving systems of linear equations.
apply: Students will be able to apply the formula for finding the determinant of a 2x2 matrix.
Students will be able to use cofactor expansion to find the determinant of a 3x3 matrix.
Students will be able to solve a system of linear equations using the determinant method.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the properties of determinants, such as the effect of elementary row operations on determinants.
Students will be able to compare the determinants of two different matrices.
Students will be able to use determinants to solve problems related to the existence and uniqueness of solutions to systems of linear equations.

ncert_objectives: To understand the concept of determinants and their importance in solving systems of linear equations.
To learn the methods of finding determinants of different types of matrices, such as 2x2, 3x3, and 4x4.
To apply the properties of determinants to solve problems related to systems of linear equations.
board_exam_objectives: Students will be tested on the properties and methods of finding determinants, including cofactor expansion and the use of minors and cofactors.
Students will be required to solve problems related to systems of linear equations using determinants.
Students will be tested on their understanding of the role of determinants in the existence and uniqueness of solutions to systems of linear equations.
